description:
Your company is launching a VIP Support tier for enterprise clients. Log in at http://localhost:8080 with admin@helpdesk.local / Admin123! and perform the full setup.

Create a 'VIP Support' mailbox (vip@helpdesk.local). Create agent Jordan Mitchell (jordan.mitchell@helpdesk.local, User role) and grant access to VIP Support only.

Review the 6 conversations in 'General Support'. Conversations from enterprise customer domains (@pinnacle-systems.com, @meridian-corp.com, @summit-engineering.com) must be moved to VIP Support and assigned to Jordan Mitchell. Non-enterprise conversations must remain in General Support untouched.

Configure VIP Support auto-reply with subject 'VIP Support — Request Received' and body containing: 'dedicated account manager', '4-hour response guarantee', and 'vip-support@helpdesk.local'.

The conversation 'Production Server Cluster Failing Health Checks' was erroneously closed. Reopen it (set to Active) and add an internal note: 'Reopened per VIP escalation policy — closed in error by previous handler.' Then send a reply apologizing for the oversight and confirming Jordan Mitchell is the assigned specialist.

Update the Pinnacle Systems contact's customer profile: set Company to 'Pinnacle Systems Inc.' and Phone to '+1-415-555-0192'.

Finally, deactivate the account for 'Temp Worker' (temp.worker@helpdesk.local). Do not delete it.

metadata.closed_conv_subject: Production Server Cluster Failing Health Checks
metadata.data_source: Synthetic enterprise support scenarios based on realistic corporate helpdesk data
